stemHtml: Consider two different aircraft. Aircraft 1 is a SEP with a 160 hp engine and weighs 1300 kg. Aircraft 2 is a twin-engine piston aircraft with two of the same 160 hp engines, and also weighs 1300 kg. In the event of an engine failure on aircraft 2, which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Aircraft 1 will have a higher power-to-weight ratio than aircraft 2
options.b: Aircraft 2 will have a higher power-to-weight ratio than aircraft 1
options.c: Both aircraft will have the same power-to-weight ratio
options.d: It is impossible to determine which aircraft will have the higher power-to-weight ratio
